reviews.text:
Going into this new treatment plan, I was doubtful that this would work. I had many symptoms of Menopause, at least 20 for over 15 years or so of suffering. Didn't know if this would work.
Well I was totally amazed that this treatment was working. Been on BHRT for about 7 months. Just had my third treatment today. I didn't write a review after the second treatment because I wanted to make sure it would stay working.
I have turned a 180° degrees, on how I am feeling. More energy, less pain, better sleep, no sweats of any kind. My depression is gone along with anxiety attacks, better focus, less brain fog and no more sleeping pills or the other meds I was on. 5 to 6 years ago, I was on several. A higher libido sex drive, lost some weight, etc. You get the idea.
I feel so energetic, it's like static electricity going through my body. Which in turn, gives me a new zest and outlook on life! I lost 15 pounds, so I went clothes shopping for new dude's. I feel like I'm on this new high! I first got off the many meds and got onto vitamins and supplements, diet and exercise to start with, but needed more. Hesse why I am  where I am today, after coming here.
I can't thank Revitalizing Health and Hormones enough on this 'new me'. Kelly Cook, Anna, Che? name escapes, the correct spelling that is, and the rest of the team. How helpful they have been on 'this journey '. Very informative on their products and supplements. Did I say helpful and answering questions and me telling them how am I doing. Also had anxiety about blood work and pellets the first go around, but they got me through it. Not an issue anymore  I would Highly recommend them, to help other women out there, looking for answers. So don't lose hope, because help is out there. I'm smiling alot more too. Sincerely, Doreen 😁

reviews.text:
Before TRT with Gameday, my depth of endurance was low and my fatigue was high. I was eating all the right foods, exercising, and wasn't overweight, but always tired and workout recoveries were getting longer and with no gains. I was actually going backwards in physical capabilities with regard to workouts and conditioning and for an active person, that's not what I wanted.

I had read many articles of how to improve endurance and there are a lot of consumer products that claim the same benefits of TRT, but none of these non TRT products had any benefit for me.

I also went through the traditional method to seek help via my primary care physician which didn't seem to want to use any actual Men TRT therapy as he would say it normal to feel the way I did at my age. Getting my primary care physician to test my testosterone's level was a battel. My primary care physician really didn't want to test me for low Testosterone. So I figured there wasn't much I could do with the traditional route and basically gave up on the idea of feeling good and having a better quality of life.

Then, I found a Brick & Mortar company named "Gameday" which was in our town. First contact was over the phone and was a great conversation. I made an appointment and found that the staff was first rate. The method of treatment is exactly what I would have expected from a good Health Care Provider, only they actually heard what I was saying, they interviewed me, tested me and then gave me a detailed consultation that wasn't pushy in any direction, meaning the choice was mine.

Now I finally had an option for treatment, I could proceed and find out for myself what I was missing without TRT therapy.
I opted to start the TRT therapy. Gameday staff continues to monitor me via office visits for testing and phone calls. The difference before and after with TRT therapy is like night and day!

I have been on for about 8 months and I will never go back to the way it was before TRT therapy. Thank you Gameday Team!

His expertise, professionalism, and genuine care make him an exceptional provider. I highly recommend Revamp to anyone seeking comprehensive and thoughtful care!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ_Sr48Cb6AogR0vuW67dTsbI/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNyaXEtSk9REAE
reviews.text: Switched to this clinic in February 2024 from an online hormone replacement therapy company I was using, looking for more personalized hormone therapy care. I was feeling good on my other program but wanted a company that re-tested my levels more frequently. I was told I had to sign a contract for a year (non refundable). I got a discount paying all at once so I did. Sadly, things have only gone downhill for me since then (I should have known better when they told me I had to commit for year). I have been feeling worse and worse since I started there. Every appointment I tell them, but they don’t seem to know what to do to help me feel any better. Getting my prescriptions sent in a timely fashion has been difficult and often takes me following up, customer service is not good and to top it off I just requested a new bottle of hormones since the one I had crystallized and was causing unusual pain at the injection site, and they told to to heat it up to dissolve the crystals and keep using it and then if I still had problems they would send me a new one. My experience here has been so bad I am taking a loss on the remaining 6+ months I already paid for and going elsewhere. Buyer beware if you are looking for hormone therapy treatment!

(I'm 65)

She’s professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely takes the time to listen and make sure everything is done safely - including regular bloodwork and thoughtful conversations around results. BioTE has made such a difference in how I feel, and I honestly can’t imagine not doing it. I feel great, and I trust that my care is always handled thoughtfully and safely.

I’ve also had several other services here over the years, including CoolPeels, Botox, BBL laser, and PRP, and I’ve consistently had excellent experiences. The results are fantastic - and the care is thoughtful, never rushed or pushy.

Dr. Sabeti is fantastic, and I wouldn’t go anywhere else. Highly recommend her and the team at Forever Young.

reviews.text:
This review is to document a serious concern regarding business practices at Men's Health and Wellness Center.

In November, I renewed my annual membership with the expectation of continued services through their Green Bay location. Without any prior notice, communication, or transition planning, the Green Bay office was subsequently closed. I was not informed directly as a paying patient; I discovered this only by visiting their website.

Since that time, I have made repeated attempts to contact the organization through multiple channels, including phone calls and emails. These attempts have gone completely unanswered. Additionally, it appears that calls originating from a Green Bay area code are being blocked, further limiting any ability to resolve the issue.

As a result, I have paid for services that are no longer being provided, with no communication, no resolution, and no refund. This lack of transparency and failure to respond raises serious concerns about their business practices and customer accountability.

At this point, my next step is to pursue recovery of funds through small claims court.

I strongly advise prospective customers to exercise caution. Based on my experience, there is significant risk in prepaying for services with this organization, as you may have limited recourse if services are discontinued or communication ceases.

reviews.text:
I would like to give Renew Vitality a huge thank you. I had my primary care doctor do a testosterone level test on me to find my level at 330. They said my levels were fine.  Being a former Ironman Athlete, I was in great physical condition. I still felt as if something was missing in my life.  July of 2024, I called Renew Vitality and spoke with Josh Vanderlugt about TRT. Josh explained the process and connected me with Dr. Staller. I was approved for TRT and started the treatment. What a game changer! My body feels great, and my mind is clear. The cognitive aspect is one I'm most grateful for.  I'm gaining weight (162 to 185 lbs) and putting muscle mass on. I will turn 60 years old in July and be in the best overall health of my life.

Josh has been a great asset. I call and talk with him, and he explains the products, tells me of the benefits, and answers all of my questions. He passes all of the information to Dr, Staller. reviews.text:
I was very impressed during my first visit to Gameday. The facility was very nice and the owner immediately introduced herself to me and was extremely friendly. Unlike many of the other clinics out there which rely on mail-in testing and Telehealth visits, all of their staff are always on site. Even their lab is on site. Rather than mail-in lab testing every 6 months, these guys run tests 5 times per year and stay on top of things that can lead to adverse events, such as hematocrit and estrogen. They tailor the therapy to your specific needs and are very knowledgeable about side effects. Their first visit, which includes both baseline lab testing and the consultation with a medical professional, was completely free! Overall, I was super impressed with Gameday.

Updated review:
I've been with Gameday for about 8 weeks now and it has been fantastic. My treatment plan has had to be modified a bit and the staff have been absolutely wonderful, helping with every detail. Sheri and Naomi have been awesome. I actually prefer them over my primary care physician! They are so helpful and knowledgeable and really make you feel right at home. I'd recommend Gameday to anyone.
